steps.title: Use the line directly
steps.content: At $x=8,500$ feet, the line of best fit passes through about $y=39$. The point on the model is approximately $(8500,39)$.

steps.title: Optional direct check
steps.content: Using two points from the same line, such as $(6000,44)$ and $(9000,38)$, a two-point line calculation predicts $39$ at $x=8500$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The predicted temperature is $39^\circ\text{F}$, which matches B.
